Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: sepulchral buildings [300005881], funerary buildings [300005866], funerary structures [300122208], ceremonial structures [300263489], single built works by function [300004894], single built works by specific type [300004795], single built works (built environment) [300004790], Single Built Works (hierarchy name) [300004789], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: storage facilities [300007700], single built works by function [300004894], single built works by specific type [300004795], single built works (built environment) [300004790], Single Built Works (hierarchy name) [300004789], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Places where the bones of the dead are deposited.
Lugar donde se depositan los huesos de los muertos.
Plaatsen waar de botten van de doden worden achtergelaten.
Ort, an dem die Gebeine der Toten aufbewahrt werden.
